title: Analyses
description: The Analyses section enables researchers to design and execute a full spectrum of epidemiological and clinical studies, including characterization, incidence rates, treatment pathways, population-level estimation, patient-level prediction, self-controlled case series, and evidence synthesis. Studies can be packaged and shared across the research community.
tips: Start with a Characterization analysis to understand the baseline demographics and clinical profile of your cohort before running comparative studies.
Use the Study Designer to define study parameters in a structured, reproducible way that can be exported as a study package.
Leverage Evidence Synthesis to pool results across multiple data sources and increase statistical power.
Review incidence rate stratifications by age and gender to uncover subgroup patterns that aggregate results may obscure.
Use the Community Workbench SDK to share and reuse analysis templates with collaborators across your network.
